stories.title: Giannis Trade — Draft Eve, Heat Still Frontrunner, Celtics Intensifying
stories.angle: Draft night is tomorrow (June 23, Barclays Center, Brooklyn). Giannis "wants to be in Miami" per league sources, but the Celtics have intensified efforts — reportedly exploring a multi-team deal that could move Jaylen Brown to a third team. Heat package: Tyler Herro + Kel'el Ware + Jaime Jaquez Jr. + No. 13 pick. Bucks wanted this resolved before the draft. Marc Stein still characterizes deal as "drawing near." Tonight may be the last chance for Milwaukee to finalize a deal before picks are swapped on draft night.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Giannis "wants to be in Miami" — Heat still in the driver's seat on draft eve. Herro + Ware + Jaquez + No. 13 is Milwaukee's best offer. Deal could come tonight. #MiamiHeat #Bucks

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Don't count Boston out. Celtics INTENSIFIED Giannis talks — exploring a multi-team deal that could move Jaylen Brown to a third team. Draft is TOMORROW. #Celtics #Bucks

article.headline: Giannis Trade — Draft Eve: Heat Remain Frontrunner as Celtics Make Late Push

research.facts:
Giannis Trade — Draft Eve Update

- Heat package: Tyler Herro + Kel'el Ware + Jaime Jaquez Jr. + No. 13 pick — multiple sources

- Bucks co-owner Jimmy Haslam wanted resolution "before the draft" — previously confirmed
- Marc Stein described deal as "drawing near" — previously confirmed
**MEDIUM confidence:**
- Jaylen Brown not expected to go to Milwaukee in multi-team scenario — CBS Sports report
- Giannis eligible for $275M extension starting Oct. 1

stories.title: NBA Draft Eve — Wizards' "Tough Call": Dybantsa or Peterson at No. 1
stories.angle: Twenty-four hours until the draft. Washington Wizards still officially "torn" between AJ Dybantsa and Darryn Peterson, per ESPN insiders who call it a "tough call." Dybantsa holds -450 betting odds at No. 1 despite not working out for any team ("They know what I can do"). Peterson's counterstrategy: only visited Washington, refusing all other team meetings to signal he's No. 1 or nothing. The Jazz project to take whichever prospect the Wizards pass on at No. 2. Draft 8 PM ET Tuesday on ABC/ESPN.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: AJ Dybantsa didn't work out for a single team before the draft. His reason: "I don't gotta work out. They know what I can do." -450 odds at No. 1. Draft is TOMORROW. #NBADraft #Wizards

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Darryn Peterson's strategy: visit ONLY the Wizards. Refuse everyone else. No. 1 or nothing. Washington is still "torn." Draft night tomorrow 8 PM ET on ABC. #NBADraft

article.headline: NBA Draft Eve 2026: Wizards Still "Torn" Between Dybantsa and Peterson at No. 1

stories.title: Austin Reaves — Lakers Exclusive Window, Must Decide by June 29
stories.angle: The clock is ticking on Austin Reaves' player option. He must opt out of his $14.9M option by June 29, one day before free agency opens June 30. Lakers hold exclusive negotiating window now and can offer 5yr/$239M (vs. Nets' 4yr/$178M max). League executives expect Reaves to re-sign in LA — he's said he wants to stay for his entire career. Doncic partnership is the key retention argument, but Reaves has confirmed the decision "will not come down solely to dollars."

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Austin Reaves has until June 29 to opt out of his $14.9M deal. Lakers can offer 5yr/$239M. Nets lurking at $178M. One week until the decision that defines the Lakers' next era. #LakeShow

article.headline: Austin Reaves' $239M Decision: Lakers in Exclusive Window as June 29 Deadline Approaches

research.facts:

stories.title: Ja Morant Trade Market — Memphis Holds Through Draft Night
stories.angle: Memphis has deliberately pumped the brakes on Ja Morant trade talks until tomorrow's draft resolves the Giannis sweepstakes. Heat remain Morant's most likely destination as Plan B if they miss Giannis. Phoenix Suns and Sacramento Kings are also in the conversation. Morant has 2 years/$87M remaining ($42.1M next season, $44M in 2027-28). The post-draft market could move fast — and Memphis holds the No. 3 overall pick that could sweeten any deal.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Memphis is deliberately waiting on Giannis before entering the Ja Morant trade market. Heat are Plan B. Suns and Kings also circling. 2 yrs/$87M left on his deal. #Grizzlies #NBA

article.headline: Ja Morant Trade Market Frozen Until Draft Night — Then It Could Explode

stories.title: Knicks Championship Offseason — No. 24 Pick Tomorrow, Brunson Extension Next
stories.angle: The reigning champions enter draft night with the No. 24 pick (plus No. 31 and No. 55 in Round 2). New York's offseason checklist: nail the draft, lock up OG Anunoby and Karl-Anthony Towns (free agency opens June 30), then negotiate Jalen Brunson's extension. The luxury-tax bill will be massive, but the Knicks have the championship goodwill and a proven core — first repeat attempt in franchise history starts tomorrow night.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Reigning champs enter draft night with three picks (No. 24, No. 31, No. 55). Then free agency opens June 30 — OG, KAT, and Brunson's extension all on the table. The Knicks' repeat window is NOW. #NewYorkKnicks

article.headline: Knicks Championship Offseason Begins: No. 24 Pick Tomorrow, Extensions to Follow
